title: Mr. 3 Measures the Giants’ Power
description: On pages 1–4, mr. 3 measures the giants’ power as mr. 3 tightens his plan around the captured crew, forcing Luffy and Usopp to fight through smoke, wax, and Baroque Works tricks.
scene: Mr. 3 Measures the Giants’ Power. Mr. 3 tightens his plan around the captured crew, forcing Luffy and Usopp to fight through smoke, wax, and Baroque Works tricks. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Perhaps I understand the extent of a giant's power...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: I never would have imagined he could break my candle jacket...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: It seems I must completely restrain your entire body...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Move and your arms and legs will be torn off!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Hurry up and turn all of them into wax-figures!

summary: This part centers on mr. 3 measures the giants’ power, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
